scripts.db:up: sh -c 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose up -d mongo; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up -d mongo; else echo "Docker Compose is required to start MongoDB. Install Docker Desktop or run your own MongoDB instance."; exit 1; fi'
scripts.db:down: sh -c 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose down; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose down; else echo "Docker Compose is required to stop MongoDB."; exit 1; fi'
scripts.db:logs: sh -c 'if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose logs -f mongo; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose logs -f mongo; else echo "Docker Compose is required to read MongoDB logs."; exit 1; fi'
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "wait-on tcp:4000 tcp:5173 && npm run electron:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
